name: Asparagus and Shrimp Oriental
recipeInstructions:
1. Shell and devein the shrimp.
2. Drain and slice the water chestnuts.
3. Arrange the shrimp, chestnuts, mushrooms, onion, celery, asparagus, and oranges on a large tray.
4. Heat oil in a wok or electric skillet.
5. Add onion, celery, salt, pepper, and sugar; cook, stirring until vegetables are crisp-tender.
6. Add asparagus and shrimp; place mushrooms and water chestnuts over the shrimp.
7. Sprinkle with soy sauce; arrange orange sections on top.
8. Cover; cook until mixture begins to steam.
9. Reduce heat and simmer for about 12 minutes.
10. Serve over rice. Yield: 6 servings.
